note: By default, the creator activity-map excludes intra-session edges (SESSION_PRECEDES, SESSION_PARALLEL) so the cross-session signal isn't swamped. ?include_intra_session=true restores the full edge set. Both modes preserve cross-session edges (CROSS_SESSION, INFORMED_BY across context_ids, PROVENANCE_OF, ANNOTATES, REVISES) and CHAIN_PRECEDES.
